name: bento-grid
title: BentoGrid
description: A data-driven bento layout — a CSS grid of glass Surface cards with varying column/row spans. Each cell rises and fades in on the house spring, staggered left-to-right so the grid assembles as one calm cascade. One earned-accent cell max.
pickWhen: a feature overview where the grid layout is the message — landing pages. Use `pricing-card` ×3 for plans, `kanban-board` for columns.
